title: Bluberries
description: This resource pack replaces the standard sweet berries in Minecraft with juicy, realistic blueberries.
body:
This resource pack replaces the standard sweet berries in Minecraft with juicy, realistic blueberries. Instead of the usual red bushes, you’ll now be able to harvest beautiful blue berries that look more natural and add a fresh touch to the game’s atmosphere.

Features:

🌿 Sweet berry bushes redesigned to resemble blueberry bushes.

🫐 Berries have a rich blue color and texture, resembling real blueberries.

🎨 Minimalistic and clean design that blends seamlessly with Minecraft’s default style.

🍴 Food mechanics remain unchanged — berries can still be eaten and grown, but now they look much more appetizing.

Who it’s for:

Players who enjoy cosmetic changes without altering gameplay mechanics.

Those who want to add a bit of realism and variety to the game.

Fans of simple and beautiful textures.
